perturbation.original_text: 3. Each party undertakes irrevocably and unconditionally: a. To ensure that all aspects of each transaction remain confidential.
perturbation.changed_text: 3. Each party undertakes conditionally: a. To ensure that all aspects of each transaction remain confidential unless compelled by law to disclose.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'irrevocably and unconditionally' to 'conditionally,' this perturbation introduces an exception to the confidentiality clause in Section 3a. This creates a contradiction as other sections (e.g., Section 1) establish an absolute obligation of confidentiality. It is now uncertain under what conditions confidentiality can be breached. This weakens the overall confidentiality terms and creates an in-text contradiction regarding the extent of confidentiality obligations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1. None of the parties shall divulge to any person, (other than those whose provenance it is to know it, or with proper authority) or use any trade secrets or confidential information or any financial or trade information relating to the other, which they acquire as a result of the discussing of or the entering into agreements with each other. Each Party shall endeavor to prevent its officers, employees, agents, representatives, and associates from doing anything, which, if done by Party, would be a breach of this agreement. This restriction shall continue to apply after the expiration of this Agreement, and other Agreements entered into between the Parties, without limit in point of time, but shall cease to apply to secrets or information, which came into the public domain through no fault of the Party concerned.
perturbation.justification: The original text states an 'irrevocable and unconditional' undertaking to ensure confidentiality. The changed text modifies this to a 'conditional' undertaking with an exception for legal compulsion. This directly contradicts Section 1, which states an absolute obligation of confidentiality and continues to apply even after the expiration of the agreement, with the only exception being information that enters the public domain through no fault of the party concerned. The changed text introduces a new condition that directly conflicts with the absolute obligation defined in Section 1, creating a strong in-text contradiction regarding the extent of confidentiality obligations, and weakening the terms of confidentiality.

perturbation.original_text: 6. Any dispute or controversy arising out of or relating to any interpretation, construction, performance, or breach of this Agreement shall be resolved exclusively by binding arbitration in Las Vegas, Nevada, in accordance with the rules then in effect of the American Arbitration Association, The arbitrator(s) may grant injunctions or other relief in such dispute or controversy. The decision of the arbitrator(s) shall be final, conclusive, and binding on the parties to the arbitration. Judgment may be entered on the arbitrator's decision in any court having jurisdiction. The parties to the arbitration shall each pay an equal share of the costs and expenses of such <PAGE> arbitration, and each of them shall separately pay their counsel fees and expenses.
perturbation.changed_text: 6. Any dispute or controversy arising out of or relating to any interpretation, construction, performance, or breach of this Agreement may be resolved through mediation, or if mediation fails, shall be resolved exclusively by binding arbitration in Las Vegas, Nevada, in accordance with the rules then in effect of the American Arbitration Association, The arbitrator(s) may grant injunctions or other relief in such dispute or controversy. The decision of the arbitrator(s) shall be final, conclusive, and binding on the parties to the arbitration only if both parties consent to it in writing. Judgment may be entered on the arbitrator's decision in any court having jurisdiction. The parties to the arbitration shall each pay an equal share of the costs and expenses of such <PAGE> arbitration, but the prevailing party shall be entitled to recover its counsel fees and expenses.
perturbation.explanation: By adding a mediation option before arbitration and making the arbitrator's decision binding only with written consent, this change contradicts the original clause that establishes arbitration as the exclusive and binding method for dispute resolution, altering the mandatory nature of the dispute resolution process. Section 5 states that the agreement is binding, but arbitration isn't, therefore in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5. This Agreement has been entered into by each Party acting on its own free will and judgment and shall be binding on the Parties, their heirs or successors, administrators, and assignees.
perturbation.justification: The original text in Section 6 states that any dispute shall be resolved exclusively by binding arbitration, and the decision shall be final, conclusive, and binding. The changed text introduces mediation as an option and states that the arbitrator's decision is only binding if both parties consent in writing. This contradicts Section 5, which states that the agreement shall be binding on the parties, as the change makes the arbitration decision non-binding unless both parties consent. Therefore, the change creates a direct conflict, inconsistency, or contradiction within the document, making it a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 4. Each Party acknowledges that any breach of the terms and conditions of this Agreement by either party or its employees, agents, representatives or associates may render the seeking of liquidated damages, by the other and the cancellation and termination of all agreements and transactions.
perturbation.changed_text: 4. Each Party acknowledges that any material breach of the terms and conditions of this Agreement by either party or its employees, agents, representatives or associates may render the seeking of liquidated damages, by the other, but cancellation and termination of all agreements and transactions is not permitted.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation introduces the concept of 'material breach', limiting the circumstances under which liquidated damages can be sought and explicitly prohibiting cancellation and termination of agreements even in case of a breach. This in-text contradict with the original text where cancellation and termination was permitted in case of any breach
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. Each Party acknowledges that any material breach of the terms and conditions of this Agreement by either party or its employees, agents, representatives or associates may render the seeking of liquidated damages, by the other, but cancellation and termination of all agreements and transactions is not permitted.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the original agreement by introducing 'material breach' as a condition for seeking liquidated damages and explicitly prohibits cancellation and termination of agreements, even in the event of a breach. The contradicted text in this case is identical to the changed text and serves as the area where the contradiction is triggered within the document. The original text permitted cancellation and termination for 'any' breach, creating a direct contradiction as the revised version prevents this action, regardless of the severity of the breach.

perturbation.original_text: g. Each Party shall endeavor to ensure that any of its officers, employees, agents, representatives or associates who, by virtue of their duties may receive the type of information described in this Agreement, are fully obligated to respect the spirit and terms of this Agreements in the same way as each Party. Each Party shall undertakes to have those officers, employees, agents, representatives or associates acknowledge their obligation by Countersigning a copy of this Agreement, thereby binding them to honor the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: g. Each Party shall endeavor to ensure that any of its officers, employees, agents, representatives or associates who, by virtue of their duties may receive the type of information described in this Agreement, are generally expected to respect the spirit and terms of this Agreements in the same way as each Party. Each Party shall not be required to have those officers, employees, agents, representatives or associates acknowledge their obligation by Countersigning a copy of this Agreement, thereby not fully binding them to honor the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The altered text in Section 3g weakens the obligation for officers, employees, etc., to respect the agreement's terms. By changing 'fully obligated' to 'generally expected' and removing the requirement for countersigning, the altered text contradicts the overall intent of the agreement to ensure full confidentiality and non-circumvention which the rest of the text is trying to achieve. This directly contradicts any reliance on full restriction terms mentioned elsewhere.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. Each Party acknowledges that any material breach of the terms and conditions of this Agreement by either party or its employees, agents, representatives or associates may render the seeking of liquidated damages, by the other, but cancellation and termination of all agreements and transactions is not permitted.
perturbation.justification: The original text in Section 3g ensures that officers, employees, etc., are fully obligated and bound by countersigning, creating a strong level of commitment. The changed text weakens this by stating they are 'generally expected' and are 'not required' to countersign, thus 'not fully binding them'. This directly contradicts Section 4, which states that any breach by employees, agents, etc., may result in liquidated damages. The weakened obligation makes it unclear if a breach by someone not fully bound would trigger the damages, thus causing a strong in-text contradiction and making it unclear which terms should be enforced.
